info.text: Winning is the cherry on top of the sundae.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: You won't get very far if you don't learn to follow the rules.

info.text: You won't get very far if you don't learn to follow the rules.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: He's playing with the big boys now.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: He's playing with the big boys now. He's got on his big-boy pants.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Hang in there! Persistence is outlasting the storm.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: You need a little practice before you can beat me.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: You need a little practice before you can beat me. Practice makes perfect.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: The game was up when he got arrested.

info.text: The game was up when he got arrested. He got caught out.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is a game.  Winning is the cherry on top of the sundae
